privileged_info_summary: The dataset 'Exam Anxiety.csv' (from Field 2013) is copied to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. The task requires building an SEM path model using lavaan syntax where 'Anxiety' is predicted by 'Revise' ('Anxiety ~ Revise') and 'Exam' is predicted by 'Anxiety' ('Exam ~ Anxiety'), while explicitly excluding the direct path from 'Revise' to 'Exam' ('Exam ~ Revise'). Executing this exact restricted model independently in R yields a Chi-square statistic of 1.829 (df=1) and an exact p-value of 0.176. Because the p-value is greater than 0.05, the correct conclusion is that the restricted model has a 'good fit' to the data. The JASP analysis must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Exam_Path_Model.jasp' and the report to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Model_Fit_Report.txt'.
